title: LUX Shader
description: is a lightweight, performance-friendly, and visually stunning Iris/OptiFine shaderpack designed for Minecraft.
body:
LUX Shader is a lightweight, performance-friendly, and visually stunning Iris/OptiFine shaderpack designed for Minecraft. Built on a clean and optimized foundation, LUX elevates the vanilla aesthetic with vibrant colors, premium atmospheric effects, and fully redesigned dimensions.

Designed to keep gameplay visibility high while delivering a "wow" factor, LUX Shader runs exceptionally well on low-end and modern computers alike.

**Credits & Attribution: LUX Shader is a modified, custom fork of the original Mellow Shader created by TheCMK (released under the MIT License). All credits for the brilliant base code go to them!**
